Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}They talked to me about why they were getting divorced.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}It was sad, but I listened to the whole thing. Did I do good?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Hey! Being a good listener is hard, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}They said when there's no love, it's hard to stay married.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}But... they said not to worry, 'cause they would love me no matter what...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So I told them... it's okay if they get divorced.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It must be hard to live with someone you don't love.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I have to choose if I wanna live with Mom or Dad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Who do you think I should pick?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Yeah... I love my dad! He always buys me toys and stuff![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 13 13 15 110}But... Mom cries all the time now. I don't want her to be all alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Yeah... Mom cries all the time now. I don't want her to be all alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}If I go with Mom, I might have to move somewhere far away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}And then I won't be able to play with you anymore! That's no fair...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko seems very fond of me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}Hey, will you hold my hand on the way home?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After seeing Maiko home,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
